title: Property Consultant - PropTiger - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - PropTiger - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
PropTiger has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About PropTiger:
PropTiger is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropTiger!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
